_doc: Pinned sha256 of the Marksman LSP binaries we ship. Per FR-27, install aborts if the downloaded artefact's sha256 does not match the entry below for the current platform/arch. To refresh after a version bump: run `npx tsx tools/marksman-installer/cli-update-hashes.ts --version <X.Y.Z>` — that CLI downloads each tarball, computes sha256, writes this file. A maintainer reviews the diff and commits.
